summary: Tested integration truth consistency across APIs and pages. All 19 backend API tests pass. Frontend shows temporary 'Verifying CRM/Accounting' loading badges that resolve after ~20 seconds - these are NOT perpetual states but properly resolve once integration-status finishes loading.

issues: Shows 'Verifying CRM' and 'Verifying Accounting' badges during initial load (~5-20 seconds) before switching to 'Connect CRM'/'Connect Accounting' prompts - not a bug, behaves as designed
Shows 'Checking integrations...' and 'Data Confidence: Verifying' during initial load - these resolve correctly after integration status API returns

critical_code_review_comments: Integration truth shape is consistent across /api/user/integration-status and /api/integrations/merge/connected - both return canonical_truth with crm_connected, accounting_connected, email_connected, hris_connected, total_connected, live_signal_count, last_signal_at

Cognition overview at /api/cognition/overview returns integrations: { crm: boolean, accounting: boolean, email: boolean, hris: boolean } which is consistent with the canonical_truth from integration-status endpoints
Watchtower at /api/intelligence/watchtower returns fallback-safe empty events: { events: [], count: 0 } when workspace is absent - no errors
Frontend useIntegrationStatus hook merges data from 3 sources: /user/integration-status, /integrations/merge/connected, and /snapshot/latest for robustness

success_rate.frontend: 100% - pages load correctly, no perpetual states detected

context_for_next_testing_agent: Integration truth is consistent across all APIs. The 'Verifying CRM/Accounting' badges in RevenuePage and 'Checking integrations' in Dashboard are temporary loading states that resolve correctly once the useIntegrationStatus hook finishes its API calls. Test user has no workspace initialized hence /integrations/crm/deals returns 400 which is expected behavior.
